title: Step 1: Project scaffolding and data models

description: Parse Python files to extract imports using ast module, regex fallback for syntax errors

title: Step 4: Import resolver and component grouper
Step 5a: Implement skeleton generator
description: Generate token-efficient text from DependencyGraph with file tree and dependency edges sections

description: Invoke gh copilot CLI with skeleton, parse response, strip markdown fences

title: D2 output writer (writer.py)

title: CLI entry point (cli.py)
description: Implement argparse CLI wiring full pipeline: config->analyze->skeleton->LLM->write

title: Implement D2 diagram merger (anchor-based)
description: Parse D2 files, compute diff sets, merge preserving order/comments, 80% removal protection

title: Java parser: regex-based import and package extraction
Wire Java/C parsers into analyzer with import resolution
description: Add Java/C import resolution logic and register parsers in _parse_imports/_resolve_imports

title: Step 9: Skeleton quality improvements - signatures, ranking, three-section budget
Step 10: LLM prompt refinement and multi-diagram support
description: Two-pass LLM approach, diagram-type-specific prompts, retry logic, multi-diagram CLI

title: Step 11a: Copilot extension check and D2 validation
description: Add gh copilot extension installed check, D2 output validation (at least one node+edge), and enhanced logging throughout pipeline

title: Step 11b: Integration test fixtures and tests
description: Create sample Python/Java/C project fixtures, add integration tests exercising full pipeline
